list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;A college-set romantic drama chronicling the unexpected love story between a music student and
list.vod_content: A college-set romantic drama chronicling the unexpected love story between a music student and the university's star hockey player, exploring themes of love and the complexities of adulthood through deep friendships and enduring bonds.
